arguments.content:
# Weekly API Health Summary Report

**Report Period:** 2026-04-08 to 2026-04-15  
**Generated At:** 2026-04-15T14:53:00-04:00  
**Report Owner:** Backend Engineering Team

---

## 1. Availability

| Metric | This Week | Target | Status |
|--------|-----------|--------|--------|
| Uptime | 99.7% | 99.9% | ⚠️ Below Target |
| Total Downtime | 30.2 minutes | — | — |
| Scheduled Maintenance | 15 minutes | — | — |

**Notes:**
- Unscheduled downtime of 15.2 minutes due to database connection pool exhaustion on 2026-04-12 at 02:15 UTC.
- Issue resolved by scaling connection pool and implementing circuit breaker.

---

## 2. Error Rates

| Metric | This Week | Last Week | Target | Status |
|--------|-----------|-----------|--------|--------|
| Average Error Rate | 1.58% | 1.75% | < 2.0% | ✅ On Track |
| 5xx Errors | 0.9% | 1.1% | < 1.0% | ⚠️ Near Limit |
| 4xx Errors | 0.68% | 0.65% | — | — |

**Daily Breakdown:**
- Lowest: 1.4% (Apr 15)
- Highest: 1.9% (Apr 11)
- Trend: Improving ↓

---

## 3. Response Times

| Metric | This Week | p95 Target | Status |
|--------|-----------|------------|--------|
| Average Response Time | 138 ms | — | — |
| p50 (Median) | 95 ms | — | — |
| p95 Response Time | 305 ms | < 400 ms | ✅ On Track |
| p99 Response Time | 485 ms | < 600 ms | ✅ On Track |

**Notes:**
- Response times improved by 8% compared to last week.
- Query optimization on `/api/v1/projects` endpoint reduced avg latency from 220ms to 165ms.

---

## 4. Notable Incidents

### INC-2026-0412-001: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
- **Date:** 2026-04-12 02:15 UTC
- **Duration:** 15.2 minutes
- **Severity:** P2 (High)
- **Impact:** 12% of API requests failed during incident window
- **Root Cause:** Connection pool misconfiguration after deployment
- **Resolution:** Increased connection pool size from 50 to 100; added automatic scaling
- **Action Items:**
  - [ ] Implement connection pool monitoring dashboard — Assigned: Bai — Due: 2026-04-18
  - [ ] Add alerting for connection pool utilization > 80% — Assigned: Alex — Due: 2026-04-20

### INC-2026-0414-002: Elevated 5xx Errors on `/api/v1/reports`
- **Date:** 2026-04-14 14:30 UTC
- **Duration:** 8 minutes
- **Severity:** P3 (Medium)
- **Impact:** Report generation endpoint temporarily degraded
- **Root Cause:** Timeout on downstream analytics service
- **Resolution:** Increased timeout threshold; added retry logic with exponential backoff

---

## 5. Action Items & Follow-ups

| Task | Owner | Due Date | Priority |
|------|-------|----------|----------|
| Connection pool monitoring dashboard | Bai | 2026-04-18 | P1 |
| Alert for connection pool utilization | Alex | 2026-04-20 | P1 |
| Review SLO compliance for Q1 closeout | Alex | 2026-04-16 | P2 |
| Document incident response runbook | Dana | 2026-04-22 | P3 |

---

## 6. Summary

Overall API health this week shows **improving trends** in error rates and response times, but **availability missed target** due to the connection pool incident. Error budget remaining: **42.3%**.

**Key Takeaways:**
- ✅ Error rates trending down (1.58% avg, below 2% target)
- ✅ Response times improved (~8% week-over-week)
- ⚠️ Availability gap: 0.2% below 99.9% SLO
- 🔧 Infrastructure resilience improvements in progress

---

*Report generated by Orion Tech Backend Engineering Team*
